nasb.text: All Israel buried him and mourned for him, according to the word of the Lord which He spoke through His servant Ahijah the prophet.

esv.text: And all Israel buried him and mourned for him, according to the word of the Lord, which he spoke by his servant Ahijah the prophet.

cnv.text: 以色列眾人把他埋葬了，又為他舉哀，好像耶和華藉著他的僕人亞希雅先知所說的話一樣。

ccb.text: 以色列人埋葬了他，为他哀悼，正应验了耶和华借祂仆人亚希雅先知说的话。
